title: English Peppery Braised Muffin
description: A hearty, comforting dish that combines the flavors of English breakfast and peppery spices. Serve with a side of crunchy freshness.
instructions: Cook the bacon in a pan until crispy, then set aside.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the pan and cook until they release their moisture and start browning.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the peppery sausage to the pan and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the irish braise, all-purpose flour, and butter to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Split the english muffins in half and toast until lightly browned.
Assemble the dish by spooning the sausage and braising mixture onto the muffins, topping with grated cheddar cheese and crispy bacon.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
